HGSS.564.0000:
You crossed the sea to get here?\f
That must have been hard.\f
It would be much easier if your
Pokémon knew how to Fly...\f
HGSS.564.0001:
But you can’t use Fly without this
city’s Gym Badge.\f
If you beat the Gym Leader here,
come see me.\r
I’ll have a nice gift for you.
HGSS.564.0002:
That’s Cianwood’s Gym Badge!\f
Then you should take this HM.\f
HGSS.564.0004:
Teach Fly to your Pokémon.\f
You will be able to Fly instantly
to anywhere you have visited.
HGSS.564.0005:
My husband lost to you, so he needs
to train harder.\f
That’s good, since he was getting a
little chubby.
HGSS.564.0007:
His only hobby is to battle
tough Trainers.\f
Do you want to have my
husband’s phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.564.0009:
He takes a break from the pounding
waterfall on Wednesday nights.\f
He should be able to chat with
you then.
HGSS.564.0010:
Oh, I see.
My husband won’t be a good match?
HGSS.564.0011:
Do you want to exchange your
number for my husband’s? [0200,0000]
HGSS.564.0012:
If you use Fly, you can get back
to Olivine instantly.
HGSS.564.0013:
Boulders to the north of town can
be crushed.\f
They may be hiding something.
Your Pokémon could use Rock Smash to\r
break them.
HGSS.564.0014:
Chuck, the Gym Leader, spars with
his Fighting-type Pokémon.
HGSS.564.0015:
Eusine: Yo, [0103,0000,0000].\f
Wasn’t that SUICUNE just now?\f
I only caught a quick glimpse, but I
thought I saw SUICUNE running on\r
the waves.\f
SUICUNE is beautiful and grand.
And it races through towns and\r
roads at simply awesome speeds.\f
It’s wonderful...\f
I want to see SUICUNE up close...\f
I’ve decided.
I’ll battle you as a Trainer to earn\r
SUICUNE’s respect!\f
Come on, [0103,0000,0000].
Let’s battle now!
HGSS.564.0016:
You’re amazing, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I’m starting to understand why SUICUNE
was keeping an eye on you.\f
I’m going to keep searching
for SUICUNE.\f
I have a feeling we’ll see each other
again. See you around!\f
HGSS.564.0017:
There are several islands between
here and Olivine.\f
A mythical sea creature supposedly
lives there.
HGSS.564.0018:
Cianwood City
A Port of Crashing Waves
HGSS.564.0019:
Cianwood City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Chuck\r
His Roaring Fists Do the Talking
HGSS.564.0020:
Cianwood City Pharmacy\f
500 Years of Tradition
We Await Your Medicinal Queries
HGSS.564.0021:
This is the house of Cameron,
the Photographer.\r
Take a Snapshot as a Keepsake!
HGSS.564.0022:
Entrance to the road for the
Safari Zone.\f
Experience thrilling encounters
with wild Pokémon for heart-to-heart\r
contact!\f
The Safari Zone is just around the
corner from this entrance!
